response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and an entrepreneurial background, fulfilling the minimum requirements for tenure and education. However, this role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy, ML platform development, and experience advising strategic enterprise customers. Bogdan's profile is primarily that of a hands-on Staff/Senior full-stack developer, and his exposure to AI is limited to very recent work with agentic developer tooling rather than the strategic, platform-level AI leadership required for this position.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive and builder mentality as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Strong track record of engineering leadership, mentoring, and community engagement through technical workshops and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic experience required for advising enterprise customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI technology adoption.
AI/ML experience is very recent (starting in 2025) and limited to developer tooling, lacking the recognized, deep AI expertise preferred for the role.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
